title: Signal Sniper: Airmash Relay
description: Tap allied airmash pilots with flashing relay pings before enemy missile chatter floods the multiplayer sky.

howToPlayJson.title: Signal Sniper: Airmash Relay
howToPlayJson.objective: In 2-4 minute rounds, scan a crowded top-down dogfight and tap only friendly aircraft broadcasting your team's relay signal while avoiding enemy decoys, jammed planes, and live missiles.

controls.input: Tap a blue aircraft with a pulsing ring
controls.outcome: Scores points, builds combo, and refreshes the signal timer

controls.input: Do not tap red decoy planes, gray jammed planes, or missiles
controls.outcome: Keeps lives intact and preserves multiplier

controls.input: Two-finger tap when the meter is full
controls.outcome: Briefly slows the airspace and reveals valid targets

steps: Friendly multiplayer pilots enter from all sides, weaving through an active airmash battle.
Only aircraft showing the current relay code pulse are valid targets; tap them before the pulse expires.
Each correct tag extends your combo and speeds up incoming traffic.
Enemy jets begin spoofing signals, missiles cross lanes, and weather static hides pulses.
A wrong tap or a missed valid pilot costs a life; lose all lives and the round ends.
Submit your score to the lightweight leaderboard and restart instantly offline or online.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Correct taps grant 10 points times combo multiplier. Every 5 correct tags raises the multiplier by +1 up to x8. Wrong taps break combo and remove 1 life. Near the end, rare golden squad leaders award bonus points and an+
tips: Watch for ring color first, plane shape second; enemies mimic silhouettes before they mimic timing.
Save Panic Clear for missile-heavy waves when valid targets overlap.
Short, accurate streaks score better than frantic tapping in late waves.
